summary: Iteration 19: Verified collection banner (public + admin), URL param preservation, and hero-slide button persistence. All backend (4/4) and frontend flows PASS end-to-end.

issues: Many admin tab/section labels render raw translation keys (manageCollections, createNewCollection, collectionName, showInNav, brandBackgrounds, variantsTab, etc.) instead of translated strings. i18n gaps, not functional blockers.
Banner overlay shows both collection description ('Fresh summer fragrances') and a generic subheading ('Discover our collection of luxury fragrances') stacked - looks slightly redundant.

action_items: (Optional) Fix i18n keys leaking as literal strings in Admin > Collections tab labels.
(Optional) Deduplicate banner subheading vs collection description on public collection page.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/homepage/hero-slides uses field key 'slides' while GET returns 'hero_slides' - inconsistent naming; consider aligning to avoid client-side confusion (backend tests already handle this).
Products.jsx URL-sync effect now correctly preserves collection param after fix; consider adding a regression test to keep it that way.
banner_image field accepts empty string to clear - confirmed working; ensure Pydantic model treats empty string vs None consistently.
test_credentials: Admin: konstantin.kirchev.bs@gmail.com / aS1zX2QwE34xK9 (working, cookie session set)
seed_data_creation: None - test transiently modified summer_collection description and hero_slides, then restored originals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoint PUT /api/homepage/hero-slides expects payload key 'slides' (not 'hero_slides') - only pitfall to remember. Admin CollectionsManager has data-testid=edit-collection-{slug}, edit-collection-description, edit-collection-description-en, remove-collection-banner, save-collection-edit. Products page has data-testid=products-heading, collection-description, products-grid. Hero button on homepage: data-testid=hero-button. Cookie banner appears fresh - dismiss with 'Essential Only'.
